items.example: What was the most memorable event of last year?
That trip left me with wonderful memories.
Our camping trip was a great adventure.
We celebrated my grandmother's birthday last month.
They celebrated the New Year at a big party.
Can you describe what happened that day?
There was an accident on the road yesterday.
He was disappointed when the film was cancelled.
She was embarrassed when she forgot his name.
The children were frightened by the loud thunder.
I was relieved when I passed the exam.
The concert was incredible – the best I ever attended.
She suddenly realized she left her bag on the bus.
He noticed something strange on the street.
She rushed to the station but missed the train.
There was a large crowd at the festival.
She borrowed some money from her friend.
He lent me his umbrella because it was raining.
I lost my keys somewhere in the house.
She dropped her phone on the floor.
He picked up the letter and read it immediately.
He accidentally broke a glass during dinner.
She recovered quickly after the illness.
We managed to find a taxi in the rain.
He regretted not saying goodbye to his friend.
